title: Flyconid
move_pattern: First turn picks randomly (no repeat) from: Frail Spores (weight 2) or Smash. After that, picks randomly (no repeat) from: Weakening Spores (weight 3), Frail Spores (weight 2), or Smash.
notes: On the first turn, the INITIAL random branch excludes Weakening Spores, picking only from Frail Spores or Smash. Subsequent turns use the full random pool. No move can repeat consecutively. Frail Spores also deals 9 damage in addition to applying 2 Frail to all targets.
